fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. The ticket defines a bounded first slice for session capture that does not overreach into full production synchronization. 2. A basic session-api scaffold exists under memory-viewers/memory-api with clear ownership boundaries. 3. The design names how Copilot hook payloads map into stored session records. 4. Follow-up test/doc/log evidence work is linked to the existing workflow metadata direction rather than duplicating it.
fields.title: [session-api] Plan and scaffold Copilot chat-session capture in memory-api
